_doc: UCITS inverse ETFs for portfolio hedging. All listed on LSE/XETRA — use short ticker form with CLI. Maps underlying index/sector to inverse ETF ticker.

SP500.name: Xtrackers S&P 500 Inverse Daily Swap UCITS ETF
SP500.note: Daily reset — best for short-term hedges (days to weeks)

NASDAQ100.name: WisdomTree NASDAQ 100 3x Daily Short
NASDAQ100.note: 3x leverage — use small size, short duration only

EUROSTOXX50.name: Xtrackers Euro Stoxx 50 Short Daily Swap UCITS ETF

FTSE100.name: Xtrackers FTSE 100 Short Daily Swap UCITS ETF

semiconductors.name: Xtrackers S&P 500 Inverse Daily Swap UCITS ETF
semiconductors.note: No pure semi inverse UCITS exists — use SP500 inverse as proxy

energy.name: Xtrackers S&P 500 Inverse Daily Swap UCITS ETF
energy.note: No pure energy inverse UCITS — use broad index inverse

technology.name: WisdomTree NASDAQ 100 3x Daily Short
technology.note: NASDAQ-heavy tech exposure; reduce size for 3x leverage

usage_rules.note: Daily-reset ETFs suffer compounding drag over time. Use for tactical hedges only, not long-term shorts.
